name: Superheavy Samurai Magnet
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ジシャ－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｑ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Superheavy Samurai" monster from your hand, then change this card to Defense Position. Monsters your opponent controls cannot attack any monsters, except this one.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Superheavy Samurai" monster from your hand, then change this card to Defense Position. Monsters your opponent controls cannot attack any monsters, except this one.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Superheavy Samurai" monster from your hand, then change this card to Defense Position. Monsters your opponent controls cannot attack any monsters, except this one.

attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
